title: Fantasy sleepers — May 2024 pre-draft watchlist (4 names)
html:
TL;DR

  • May 2024 pre-draft sleeper list, 4 names: Kenneth Walker III, Breece Hall (starred), Xavier Worthy, Cooper Kupp.
  • Predates the full 2024 07 30 fantasy football draft note by ~10 weeks; Breece Hall carries forward into both lists, confirming Yahir's HB target-share thesis for that season.
  • Mid-stream watchlist entry in the fantasy football trilogy longitudinal record; reinforces "RB-heavy" pattern building toward 2025's rookie-RB conviction.
  • "Cooper Cupp" misspelled as written — Yahir means Cooper Kupp (Rams WR). Typo-as-data: this is a phone-tap thumb note, not a research doc.
  • Tiny 4-line raw, classic entry — mid-season impulse capture before the deeper July draft work.

Notes

The names map cleanly to the 2024 fantasy season's actual sleeper discourse:

  • Kenneth Walker III — Seahawks RB, ADP riser
  • Breece Hall — already on Yahir's radar; the star (**) marks him as the top conviction even this early
  • Xavier Worthy — Chiefs rookie WR, draft buzz from his record-breaking combine
  • Cooper Kupp — Rams WR coming off injury, classic bounce-back sleeper play

The fact that Breece Hall survives 10 weeks of refinement into the 2024 07 30 fantasy football draft note is the interesting datum — it's the same conviction-pattern Yahir shows across the fantasy football trilogy: pick a guy early, hold the take, ride or die.

Connections

  • fantasy football trilogy — slots between 2022 and 2024 conviction notes
  • 2024 07 30 fantasy football — full draft note 10 weeks later
  • — micro-format, phone-tapped
  • peer wager app — adjacent concept (boys-league betting infra)
